title: MirrorTrace Crawler Input
description: Normally provided automatically via metamorph from Discovery. Crawls the named queue's frontier, preserves public evidence, and backs off on blocks instead of evading them.

scope_type.title: Scope type
scope_type.description: Compliant scope only. Prohibited scopes are absent.

case_id.title: Case ID
case_id.description: Case identifier issued by the Policy Gate for this audit chain.

case_store_name.title: Case KV store name
case_store_name.description: Named key-value store carrying the immutable case record across the actor chain.

queue_name.title: Frontier queue name
queue_name.description: Named Request Queue filled by Discovery (mirrortrace-frontier-<caseId>).

max_pages.title: Max pages (maxRequestsPerCrawl cost cap)
max_pages.description: Maximum number of pages processed during this bounded audit run.

checks_per_day.title: Checks per day (wellbeing signal)
checks_per_day.description: Wellbeing pacing signal used to shape Closure Mode recommendations.
